title: CFTR / ivacaftor
summary: Patients with the rs121909005 GG genotype (two copies of the CFTR S549R variant) and cystic fibrosis may respond to ivacaftor treatment. FDA-approved drug labeling information and CPIC guidelines indicate use of ivacaftor in cystic fibrosis patients with at least one copy of S549R. Other genetic and clinical factors may also influence response to ivacaftor.
